recommendations.title: Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes

recommendations.title: The Butterfly Effect

recommendations.title: The Witch: Part 1. The Subversion

recommendations.title: Eastern Promises
recommendations.overview: A Russian teenager living in London dies during childbirth but leaves clues in her diary that could tie her child to a rape involving a violent Russian mob family.

recommendations.title: Cube
recommendations.overview: A group of strangers find themselves trapped in a maze-like prison. It soon becomes clear that each of them possesses the peculiar skills necessary to escape, if they don't wind up dead first.

recommendations.title: Reminiscence

recommendations.title: Atlas Shrugged: Part I
recommendations.overview: A powerful railroad executive, Dagny Taggart, struggles to keep her business alive while society is crumbling around her. Based on the 1957 novel by Ayn Rand.

recommendations.title: Cube
recommendations.overview: Six complete strangers with widely varying personalities are involuntarily placed in an endless maze of interlocking cube-shaped rooms containing deadly traps.
